questions.question: Synonym of PERSEVERANCE:
questions.explanation: 'Perseverance' means continued effort despite difficulties. 'Persistence' has the same meaning.

questions.question: Antonym of OPTIMISTIC:
questions.explanation: 'Optimistic' means hopeful about the future. The opposite is 'Pessimistic' (expecting bad outcomes).

questions.question: Engineer : Building :: Painter : ?
questions.explanation: An engineer creates a building. A painter creates a painting.

questions.question: Telescope : Stars :: Microscope : ?
questions.explanation: A telescope is used to see stars. A microscope is used to see cells.

questions.question: Choose odd one: Carrot, Broccoli, Spinach, Apple
questions.explanation: Carrot, Broccoli, and Spinach are vegetables. Apple is a fruit.

questions.question: Chef : Kitchen :: Pilot : ?
questions.explanation: A chef works in a kitchen. A pilot works in a cockpit.

questions.question: Her _____ speech inspired the entire team.
questions.explanation: A 'motivational' speech inspires people. The other options wouldn't inspire anyone.

questions.question: Synonym of VIGOROUS:
questions.explanation: 'Vigorous' means strong and active. 'Energetic' has the same meaning.

questions.question: Compass : Direction :: Watch : ?
questions.explanation: A compass shows direction. A watch shows time.

questions.question: Antonym of ZENITH:
questions.explanation: 'Zenith' means the highest point. The opposite is 'Nadir' (the lowest point).

questions.question: Find correctly spelled word:
questions.explanation: The correct spelling is 'Receive' (i before e except after c rule doesn't apply here).

questions.question: Broom : Sweep :: Shovel : ?
questions.explanation: A broom is used to sweep. A shovel is used to dig.

questions.question: Choose odd: Copper, Silver, Gold, Plastic
questions.explanation: Copper, Silver, and Gold are metals. Plastic is not a metal.

questions.question: The new policy was _____ by all employees.
questions.explanation: Context suggests positive reception. 'Welcomed' is the positive word that fits best.

questions.question: Synonym of RESILIENT:
questions.explanation: 'Resilient' means able to recover quickly. 'Tough' conveys similar strength and durability.

questions.question: Find next: 3, 7, 11, 15, 19, ?
questions.explanation: Pattern: +4 each time. 19 + 4 = 23.

questions.question: Pattern: ◆ ◆◆ ◆◆◆ ◆◆◆◆ ?
questions.explanation: Adding one diamond each time: 1, 2, 3, 4, so next is 5.

questions.question: Which is different: Cube, Sphere, Pyramid, Rectangle
questions.explanation: Cube, Sphere, and Pyramid are 3D shapes. Rectangle is 2D.

questions.question: How many days in February 2026?
questions.explanation: 2026 is not a leap year (not divisible by 4), so February has 28 days.

questions.question: A paper folded 3 times and one hole punched. Holes when unfolded?
questions.explanation: Fold once = 2 layers, twice = 4, three times = 8. One punch = 8 holes.

questions.question: Priya is 9th from top, 18th from bottom. Total students?
questions.explanation: Total = Top + Bottom - 1. 9 + 18 - 1 = 26.

questions.question: Find next: 3, 6, 12, 24, ?
questions.explanation: Doubling each time: 3, 6, 12, 24, 48.

questions.question: Facing West, turn 90° right, then 90° right again. Final direction?
questions.explanation: West → 90° right = North → 90° right = East.

questions.question: Complete series: B, D, F, H, ?
questions.explanation: Skipping one letter: B, D (skip C), F (skip E), H (skip G), J (skip I).

questions.question: Father's sister is your:
questions.explanation: Father's sister is your aunt.

questions.question: Find odd: 2, 3, 5, 7, 9
questions.explanation: 2, 3, 5, 7 are prime numbers. 9 is not prime (3 × 3 = 9).

questions.question: How many rectangles in a 2×2 grid?
questions.explanation: 4 small (1×1) + 2 horizontal (1×2) + 2 vertical (2×1) + 1 large (2×2) = 9.

questions.question: P is taller than Q. Q is taller than R. Who is shortest?
questions.explanation: P > Q > R in height. So R is shortest.

questions.question: Clock shows 6:00. Angle between hands?
questions.explanation: At 6:00, hour hand at 6, minute hand at 12. Opposite sides = 180°.

questions.question: Find next: 5, 10, 15, 20, ?
questions.explanation: Adding 5 each time: 5, 10, 15, 20, 25.

questions.question: Find next: 3, 9, 27, 81, ?
questions.explanation: Multiplying by 3 each time: 3, 9, 27, 81, 243.

questions.question: If 25% of X is 75, what is X?
A bus travels 120 km in 2 hours. Speed?
questions.explanation: Speed = Distance / Time = 120 / 2 = 60 km/hr.

questions.question: Find next: 0, 1, 1, 2, 3, 5, 8, ?
questions.explanation: Fibonacci: Each number = sum of previous two. 5 + 8 = 13.

questions.question: If 4 pens cost ₹80, cost of 7 pens?
questions.explanation: Cost per pen = 80/4 = 20. Cost of 7 = 7 × 20 = 140.

questions.question: A completes work in 6 days, B in 9 days. Together?
Find next: 4, 9, 16, 25, ?
questions.explanation: Squares: 2², 3², 4², 5², 6² = 36.

questions.question: Distance = 450 km, Time = 6 hours. Speed?
questions.explanation: Speed = Distance/Time = 450/6 = 75 km/hr.

questions.question: If 12 workers build house in 15 days, days for 9 workers?
questions.explanation: Total work = 12 × 15 = 180 man-days. For 9 workers = 180/9 = 20 days.

questions.question: If CAR = 3-1-18, BUS = ?
questions.explanation: Alphabetical position: B=2, U=21, S=19. So BUS = 2-21-19.

questions.question: If FISH is coded as GJTI, BIRD is coded as?
questions.explanation: Each letter shifted +1: F→G, I→J, S→T, H→I. So B→C, I→J, R→S, D→E = CJSE.

questions.question: In a code, MANGO is LZMFN. GRAPE is?
questions.explanation: Each letter shifted -1: M→L, A→Z, N→M, G→F, O→N. So G→F, R→Q, A→Z, P→O, E→D = FQZOD.

questions.question: If SISTER has 6 letters, BROTHER has?
questions.explanation: BROTHER has 7 letters: B-R-O-T-H-E-R.
